distinctive_elements: full motion video cutscenes with live actors
fog of war mechanic with black shroud obscuring unseen map portions
house-specific unit designs (Atreides mechs, Harkonnen tanks, Ordos energy shields)
Dune universe aesthetic with desert planet Arrakis setting

notes: As a 2001 PC RTS game, Emperor: Battle for Dune does not utilize sprite-based graphics typical of console games. The game features 3D polygonal graphics with full motion video sequences. The Wikipedia source provided does not contain detailed visual design parameters such as sprite dimensions, color palettes, tile vocabulary, or animation frame counts. The game is documented as featuring FMV cutscenes and uses a real-time strategy gameplay paradigm with units and base building mechanics rather than traditional sprite animation.
